No Poverty.reason: The course focuses on machine learning and financial econometrics, with no explicit or strong inferred connection to poverty eradication or related targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: There is no evidence in the course description or learning outcomes that directly or indirectly relates to ending hunger or improving food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course content does not address health, well-being, disease prevention, or access to healthcare services.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it explicitly provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and equips students with relevant technical skills in machine learning and econometrics for employment (Target 4.4).
evidence: Course Name: Machine Learning and Financial Econometrics
Gain knowledge on how to use machine learning and financial econometric models.

Gender Equality.reason: No specific course content or objectives are identified that promote gender equality or address discrimination against women and girls.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: The course does not contain any elements related to water resources management, sanitation, or water quality.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: There is no evidence linking the course to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course builds capacity in machine learning and financial econometrics, directly supporting technological upgrading (Target 8.2) and strengthening financial institutions (Target 8.10) for economic growth.
evidence: Apply the statistical tools to solve financial problems.

Life on Land.reason: The course does not address terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, deforestation, or land degradation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: Machine learning and financial econometrics can be applied to detect and reduce illicit financial flows and corruption (Targets 16.4, 16.5), thereby strengthening institutions.
